parameters.query:
SELECT 
  t.token,
  t.full_name AS patient_name,
  t.test_type,
  t.test_version,
  t.status,
  d.telegram_id AS doctor_telegram_id
FROM tokens t
LEFT JOIN doctors d ON d.id = t.doctor_id
WHERE t.token = '{{ $json.query.token }}'
LIMIT 1

UPDATE tokens 
SET status = 'completed', used_at = NOW() 
WHERE token = $1

INSERT INTO results
  (submission_id, token, full_name, test_type, answers,
   score, severity, status, scoring_time_ms, n8n_execution_id)
VALUES
  ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb,
   $6, $7, 'scored', $8, $9)
ON CONFLICT (submission_id) DO UPDATE
  SET updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, token

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Validate Input1').item.json.body.submission_id }},{{ $('Validate Input1').item.json.body.session_token }},{{ $('Validate Input1').item.json.body.patient_name }},{{ $('Validate Input1').item.json.body.test_type }},{{ JSON.stringify($('Validate Input1').item.json.body.answers) }},{{ $('Validate Input1').item.json.body.score }},{{ $('Validate Input1').item.json.body.severity }},{{ $json.scoring_time_ms }},{{ $execution.id }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "session_token": "{{ $('Validate Input1').item.json.body.session_token }}",
  "score": {{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.score }},
  "severity": "{{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.severity }}",
  "severity_ua": "{{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.severity_ua }}",
  "patient_name": "{{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.patient_name }}",
  "test_type": "{{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.test_type }}",
  "test_name": "{{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.test_name }}",
  "subscales": {{ JSON.stringify($('JS: Scoring1').item.json.subscales ?? {}) }},
  "ptsd_probable": {{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.ptsd_probable ?? false }},
  "peak_scale": "{{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.peak_scale ?? '' }}",
  "peak_type": "{{ $('JS: Scoring1').item.json.peak_type ?? '' }}",
  "accentuated_types": {{ JSON.stringify($('JS: Scoring1').item.json.accentuated_types ?? []) }},
  "ai_interpretation": "{{ $json.ai_interpretation ?? '' }}"
}

parameters.query:
UPDATE results 
SET status = 'notified', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE submission_id = $1::uuid

INSERT INTO error_logs (n8n_execution_id, node_name, error_message, input_data) VALUES ('{{ $execution.id }}', 'Scoring/DB Error', '{{ $json.error?.message ?? "Unknown error" }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}'::jsonb)

SELECT status, used, expires_at 
FROM tokens 
WHERE token = $1
LIMIT 1

SELECT d.telegram_id
FROM tokens t
JOIN doctors d ON d.id = t.doctor_id
WHERE t.token = $1
